description: Small multiples: monthly home streams per artist, 2017-2021.

layer.description: Annotation line 1 - bold title in artist colour

transform.calculate: datum.artist === 'The Kid LAROI' ? 'STAY feat. Bieber — Jul 2021' : datum.artist === '5 Seconds of Summer' ? 'Youngblood peak — Jun 2018' : datum.artist === 'Vance Joy' ? 'Active all 60 months' : datum.artist === 'PNAU' ? 'Chameleon era — 2017-18' : datum.artist === 'Ruel' ? 'Free Time EP — 2019' : datum.artist === 'Ocean Alley' ? 'Cannonball — mid 2019' : datum.artist === 'Hilltop Hoods' ? 'Clark Griswold — 2019' : datum.artist === 'Peking Duk' ? 'Big 2017-18 run' : datum.artist === 'Hooligan Hefs' ? 'Emerged 2019' : 'Music soundtrack 2021'

datum.artist === 'The Kid LAROI' ? 'Peak 19M streams in one month' : datum.artist === '5 Seconds of Summer' ? 'Peak 9M — faded but held on' : datum.artist === 'Vance Joy' ? 'No spike — pure consistency' : datum.artist === 'PNAU' ? 'Peaked at 6M, dropped sharply' : datum.artist === 'Ruel' ? 'Peaked at 4M — levelled off' : datum.artist === 'Ocean Alley' ? 'Peak 3M — steady since' : datum.artist === 'Hilltop Hoods' ? 'Peak 3M — zero global reach' : datum.artist === 'Peking Duk' ? 'Peak 5M — no comeback yet' : datum.artist === 'Hooligan Hefs' ? 'Slow grind to 2M by 2021' : 'Dipped 2018-19, back in 2021'

datum.artist === 'The Kid LAROI' ? 'Fastest rise in this dataset' : datum.artist === '5 Seconds of Summer' ? '90+ weeks on global charts' : datum.artist === 'Vance Joy' ? 'Most reliable home streamer' : datum.artist === 'PNAU' ? 'Two-year window, then gone' : datum.artist === 'Ruel' ? 'Youngest peak — signed at 15' : datum.artist === 'Ocean Alley' ? 'Built loyal fanbase slowly' : datum.artist === 'Hilltop Hoods' ? 'Longest-running Aussie hip-hop act' : datum.artist === 'Peking Duk' ? 'Festival act without longevity' : datum.artist === 'Hooligan Hefs' ? 'Western Sydney drill pioneer' : '97% of streams are global'

datum.artist === 'The Kid LAROI' ? '#ff8250' : datum.artist === '5 Seconds of Summer' ? '#1DB954' : datum.artist === 'Vance Joy' ? '#ce93d8' : datum.artist === 'PNAU' ? '#ffd54f' : datum.artist === 'Ruel' ? '#64b5f6' : datum.artist === 'Ocean Alley' ? '#f48fb1' : datum.artist === 'Hilltop Hoods' ? '#a5d6a7' : datum.artist === 'Peking Duk' ? '#ffb74d' : datum.artist === 'Hooligan Hefs' ? '#ef5350' : '#4dd0e1'
